name: card
description: A surface container with an optional labelled header region (role=region + aria-labelledby when a heading is set). Plain HTML + Tailwind + --lv-* tokens, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the card partial to your JTE root at lievit/card.jte, reached as @template.lievit.card(content=@`...`). Pass a heading + headingId to render a labelled region. The source is yours: edit freely.
